mechanism_narrative: Rising policy rates increase discount rates and reduce equity valuations, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in tightening periods are not significantly lower than baseline.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid increase in the unemployment rate signals deteriorating labor market conditions that contract consumer spending, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite the unemployment spike, or the signal's predictive power vanishes after controlling for GDP growth.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in retail sales and housing starts indicates broad-based demand expansion that boosts corporate earnings expectations, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint signal fails to predict returns when either series diverges, or the combined Rank IC drops below 0.05 over a 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production reflects expanding manufacturing capacity and supply chain normalization, which supports equity valuations and yields positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: The signal produces negative returns during supply-side bottlenecks, or forward returns show no statistical difference between high and low INDPRO growth periods.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating real GDP growth expands aggregate demand and corporate profit margins, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in GDP acceleration phases are not significantly higher than baseline.

mechanism_narrative: Consumer price index surpassing 260 signals entrenched inflation that forces prolonged monetary tightening, compressing equity multiples and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX generates positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite high inflation, or the signal's predictive power vanishes after controlling for FEDFUNDS.

mechanism_narrative: Strong nonfarm payroll growth combined with a stable unemployment rate confirms a healthy labor market that sustains consumer demand and corporate earnings, yielding positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint signal fails to predict returns when payroll growth decelerates, or the combined Rank IC drops below 0.05 over a 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Declining housing starts alongside falling retail sales indicate weakening aggregate demand that reduces corporate revenue forecasts, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: The signal produces positive returns during supply-driven demand drops, or forward returns show no statistical difference between high and low demand growth periods.
